notes: Source-catalog record only. The ignored local artifact at the expected path was verified on 2026-07-16; the fingerprint identifies that reviewed artifact without distributing it. It does not establish a destination or market designation, does not establish applicability to a 1990 PZJ70, and does not contain accepted translation or graph knowledge.
